events.title: Brian May turns 69
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his birthday today

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Brian May, the iconic guitarist of Queen, turns 69 today, we're celebrating his birthday with some of his greatest hits

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 73

angles.copy: Mick Jagger, the charismatic frontman of The Rolling Stones, turns 73 today, we're looking back at his incredible career

events.title: MTV Launches
events.blurb: MTV launched on this day in 1981 with the first video being Buggles - Video Killed The Radio Star

angles.name: Music TV Revolution
angles.copy: On this day in 1981, MTV launched and changed the music industry forever, we're celebrating with some of the biggest hits of the 80s

events.title: Oasis Release Definitely Maybe
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album Definitely Maybe on this day in 1994

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Oasis' debut album Definitely Maybe was released on this day in 1994 and went on to become a Britpop classic, we're revisiting the album that started it all

events.title: Woodstock Festival

angles.name: Peace and Music
angles.copy: The legendary Woodstock Festival took place on this day in 1969, we're looking back at the music and the moment that defined a generation

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis' Death

events.title: The Beatles Release Abbey Road
